```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;">

 <div style="text-align:center;margin-bottom:0.85em;">
  <span style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#3A7DC9;background:#DCE9FA;padding:0.25em 0.7em;border-radius:999px;letter-spacing:0.12em;text-transform:uppercase;font-weight:700;">Layer 02 · Tool System</span>
  <div style="margin-top:0.55em;font-size:0.7em;color:#2C3E50;">Not just hooking tools up — solve <span style="color:#3A7DC9;font-weight:700;">three problems</span>:</div>
 </div>

 <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr 1fr;gap:0.55em;text-align:left;">

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(58,125,201,0.1);border-top:3px solid #3A7DC9;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.45em;">
    <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#DCE9FA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#3A7DC9;"><i data-lucide="scale" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">problem 01</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;color:#3A7DC9;margin-bottom:0.3em;">Which tools to give</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">Too few, the model can't act. Too many, it gets distracted.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(196,136,26,0.1);border-top:3px solid #C4881A;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.45em;">
    <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#FEF5E7;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#C4881A;"><i data-lucide="timer" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">problem 02</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;color:#C4881A;margin-bottom:0.3em;">When to call</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">Define triggers. Don't call on every turn.</div>
  </div>

  <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border-radius:14px;padding:0.85em 0.95em;box-shadow:0 4px 14px rgba(44,132,117,0.1);border-top:3px solid #2C8475;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.45em;">
    <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#E5F2EE;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#2C8475;"><i data-lucide="recycle" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#9B8EA0;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">problem 03</div>
   </div>
   <div style="font-size:0.65em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;margin-bottom:0.3em;">How to feed back</div>
   <div style="font-size:0.5em;color:#564232;line-height:1.5;">Search results, returns — clean, dedupe, summarize before re-feeding.</div>
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
